large tree with a brown trunk and green leafy canopy
glass pane fence structure
floating multi-layered structure made of grey blocks
green number '13' displayed above the hotbar
hotbar interface with a water bucket in the first slot and a glass block in the second

atomic_facts.fact: The player is holding a blue and black item in their right hand.
A row of sandstone blocks with signs is arranged on the sandy ground.
The number 13 is displayed in green text above the inventory hotbar.
A glass fence runs parallel to the row of sandstone blocks.

spatial: The player's hand holding the blue item is in the bottom right foreground. The row of sandstone blocks is in the center of the view, extending into the distance. The large tree is to the left of the sandstone blocks. The glass fence is to the right of the sandstone blocks. The floating grey structure is in the sky above the background buildings.

visible_entities.desc: Game menu overlay with grey rectangular buttons and white pixelated text
Minecraft hotbar with a water bucket in the first slot and a glass block in the second
Water bucket held in the player's hand, showing blue water and grey metal
Sand blocks arranged in a line with glass panes on top
Wooden house with glass pane windows
Blue water puddle on the sand
Green number '13' indicating experience level

atomic_facts.fact: The game menu overlay appears, obscuring the gameplay view.
The menu displays options including 'Back to Game', 'Achievements', 'Statistics', 'Options...', 'Open to LAN', and 'Save and Quit to Title'.
The player is holding a water bucket in their right hand.
The hotbar shows a water bucket selected in the first slot.
The experience level indicator shows the number 13.

spatial: The game menu is centered on the screen, overlaying the game world. The player's hand holding the water bucket is in the bottom right foreground. The hotbar is located at the bottom of the screen, below the menu. The wooden house is to the right of the sand and glass structure in the background.

The text 'Thank You For Watching' is centered on the screen.
The text 'Subscribe' is positioned below the left thumbnail.

spatial: The 'Thank You For Watching' text is centered in the middle of the screen. The 'Subscribe' text is to the left of the 'More Videos' text. The 'THE BEST FIREWORK LAUNCHER' thumbnail is to the left of the 'REMOTE DETONATING TNT!' thumbnail. The wooden arrow graphic is between the two thumbnails.
